assertions.rationale: AddDeveloperSigningCredential is removed. Line 45 has comment 'Removed: .AddDeveloperSigningCredential()'.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures KeyManagement.SigningAlgorithms with EcdsaSha256 (ES256) before RsaSha256 (RS256)
assertions.rationale: Lines 41-42 configure ES256 (EcdsaSha256) first, then RS256 (RsaSha256).

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets KeyManagement.RotationInterval to 90 days and PropagationTime to 14 days
assertions.rationale: Line 27 sets RotationInterval = 90 days, line 30 sets PropagationTime = 14 days.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures DataProtectKeys = true for key management
Program.cs configures AddDataProtection() with PersistKeysToFileSystem and SetApplicationName
